## Responsible-use checklist

- [ ] Does not add scraping of closed platforms.
- [ ] Does not add automated bulk outreach.
- [ ] Does not expose local SQLite data, exported lead lists, API keys, or personal data.
- [ ] Scoring or normalization changes include tests.
